NOTES; WOW almost 40 followers?!! Can’t believe vampires bring a lot of people, they should make a tv show out of this. Outside of that, thanks a lot! I didn’t expect the first Alucard bot to give me this much inspo and people loving it. And since I’ve been getting requests, would a bot request form help you all to leave any suggestions? Again, thank you all so much for the love on my bots. I’ll also like to do other fandoms so leave suggestions for that as well.

and for a last plotwist…English isn’t my first language muajajajjaja muchas gracias en verdad no pensé en decir esa frase en mi vida y aquí estoy
